summary: Solid soundboard capture of a strong 1985 show highlighted by an excellent China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider sequence.
review: The recording, likely sourced from the soundboard, offers clear and balanced audio that lets listeners enjoy the performance without noticeable flaws. Fans praise this concert for its standout China Cat Sunflower into I Know You Rider jam, marking it as a highlight of the 1985 era. Overall the show is regarded positively with no major issues reported.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed 4‑star review; positive comments about performance and implied good soundboard quality lead to a strong rating, but limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific issues mentioned; reviewers imply the recording is clear enough to appreciate the performance.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Review does not detail set structure, but highlights the China>Rider segment as a high point of the show.
